title: RicardoGolem
description:
Available to play on versions between 1.20 and 1.21.X.
The use of OptiFine is optional.
body: RicardoGolem is a resourcepack that will make your gaming experience more interesting. An ordinary iron golem will turn into a Brazilian blogger Ricardo Milos, who will not let you get bored. As you take damage, the golem will change its texture to a more bloody one. Enjoy the game!
